mapper.insert: insert into biztb(email, pw, phone, name, owner, certificate_no, certificate_original_name, certificate_saved_name) values(#{email}, #{pw}, #{phone}, #{name}, #{owner}, #{certificateNo}, #{certificateOriginalName}, #{certificateSavedName})
insert into biz_termstb (biz_id, term_id, agreed, agreed_at, created_at, updated_at) values (#{bizId}, #{termId}, #{agreed}, now(), now(), now())
mapper.select: select email from biztb where name = #{name} and phone = #{phone} and certificate_no = #{certificateNo}
select count(*) from biztb where email = #{email} and name = #{name} and phone = #{phone} and certificate_no = #{certificateNo}
mapper.update: update biztb set pw = #{pw} where email = #{email}
update biztb set pw = #{pw} where email = #{email}
update biztb set certificate_saved_name = null, certificate_original_name = null where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from biztb where email = #{email}

select r.room_no as roomNo, rt.name as roomName, r.name, r.email, r.checkin, r.checkout, r.phone, case r.cancelyn when 'N' then '예약성공' when 'Y' then '예약취소' else '알 수 없음' end as cancelyn, r.payment, r.adult_no as adultNo, r.child_no as childNo from reservtb r join roomtb rt on r.room_no = rt.room_no join accotb a on rt.acco_no = a.acco_no where a.biz_id = #{bizId} and r.checkin >= #{startDate} and r.checkout <= #{endDate} order by r.checkin asc
